ui.title: SCF Operational Summary
ui.desc: High-level operational stats for the SCF platform.

data.sql: SELECT 'Active Agreements' as "Metric", COUNT(*) as "Value" FROM %EXIMTRX%.FAEF_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'M' UNION ALL SELECT 'Pending Financing Requests', COUNT(*) FROM %EXIMTRX%.FAEF_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'P' UNION ALL SELECT 'Total Invoices Processed', COUNT(*) FROM %EXIMTRX%.FAEF_MASTER
